name: fridge-magnets
description: Interactive fridge magnet board — drag and rearrange word cards to compose sentences

activation.description: Place a ```fridge-magnets code fence in markdown. Cards pre-load from the 'cards' string. Users can drag, rearrange, and add new canvases.

cards.description: Pre-loaded card text. Use [text] for auto-layout or [text](x,y) for positioned cards: "[One](10,10) [gas burner](80,10)"

height.description: Initial canvas area height in pixels
